reviews.title: Great for classroom pencil holders!!
reviews.text: I just got these, after failed attempts with dollar store pencil holders. These are sturdy, and  can hold a marker, Expo, and 2 pencils!! I will update if they break, but they seem very sturdy!! I would recommend them to all my teaching friends. If they can stand up to second graders, they will stand up to anyone needing these for travel!

reviews.title: I bought these for my double point knitting needlseT
reviews.text:
These are as promised, they come individually wrapped and are clean and free of manufacturing grease.
I am not using them for the intended purpose but they are great for storing my sets of dp needles. I can find the size I want immediately and they don't spread themselves all over the drawer where they're kept any longer.
They seem to stay together very well, I can recommend them for this purpose with no reserve.

reviews.title: Great to use as pencil holders!
reviews.text: I am using these as pencil holders for my students. They are working great so far!

reviews.title: Hi
reviews.text: There bad ass I like this

reviews.title: Bought for classroom
reviews.text: I use these in my classroom for pencils. Unfortunately about 4 have broken at this point just from regular wear and tear. They are probably good for travel, but don’t withstand 4th grade usage.

title: Ultra Whitening Toothbrush Replacement Heads for Philips Sonicare, Compatible with Phillips Sonic Care E Series, Essence, Xtreme, Elite, Advance, Screw-on Electric Tooth Brush Heads Refills
features: WIDE COMPATIBILITY - Perfectly compatible with electric toothbrush replacement heads for Sonicare Essence, Advance, Elite, CleanCare and Xtreme handle. (SCREW-ON SYSTEM)

SUPERIOR WHITENING, SHINING SMILE -- Whiten your teeth in just 7 days and a bright smile you will have. High-density triangular tips bristles with more surface contact brush away 200% more stains (vs. a manual toothbrush, with whitening toothpaste)

ULTRA CLEANING, PLAQUE REMOVAL -- Just as effective as going to the dentist！ With powerful vibration, angled neck and W shape design, toothbrush heads for Philips Sonicare effectively remove up to 15X more plaque than a manual toothbrush.
BE GENTLE ON GUMS - The electric toothbrush heads for Sonicare are made of real US DuPont bristles end-rounded, which are gentle on your gums. Just enjoy a comfortable brushing experience!

NO GUESSING REPLACEMENT - You don't need to worry about missing the optimal replacement time! The blue reminder bristles will fade to timely remind you when to replace the toothbrush replacement heads for sonic care.

SHARE WITH YOUR FAMILY - 2 different color rings will help you to easily identify your own replacement toothbrush heads for Philips Sonicare. Just enjoy the happy brushing time together with your beloved!

title: Paw Patrol Electric Toothbrush and Paw Patrol Anticavity Fluoride Toothpaste 4.2 Ounce (Chase)

So what better way to transition them to fluoride toothpaste than brushing with Paw Patrol Fluoride Toothpaste. The Paw Patrol Chase Spinbrush toothbrush has small soft bristles for smaller mouths. It’s also ergonomically designed to fit little hands perfectly.

reviews.title: The flavor is WRONG, too expensive. Don’t buy!
reviews.text: The flavor is WRONG. bought this for ridiculous markup because we’ve been looking for bubble berry. NOT the same as description or picture. Flavor is bubble fruit, which my kids hate. This is double the money of just buying the toothbrush and paste separately. I wish I read more reviews. DONT BUY.

reviews.title: Check the size
reviews.text: Disappointed, I read it wrong and thought these were official oral b replacement heads. It’s smaller than the original one on my sons toothbrush and just doesn’t feel durable. I guess time will tell.

reviews.title: Bristles are harder than advertised.
reviews.text:
The description states that it has 'Extra-Soft Bristles' which is why I purchased it.
I've found this is not the case.
They are not the hardest bristles, but they're not as soft as advertised.

reviews.title: Were they kidding?
reviews.text:
Not soft at all.
Has a piece that sticks out of the middle.
Totally inappropriate for children!
To be used with an Oral-B toothbrush that is so harsh?
I contacted the seller before I bought but never got a reply.

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: Good deal compared to buying name brand but they do feel like cheap plastic and they’re not the softest. Worth it though to save some money if you want to change them out as often as you should. The oral b brand replacements are too expensive IMO.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Son likes the different color. Fits his oral b toothbrush well. Perfect for little ones teeth. Thank you

reviews.title: Will buy again.
reviews.text: Using for laundry - spot cleaning.

reviews.title: Three Stars
reviews.text: The handle is kinda weird to hold onto.

reviews.title: the Artists' (Tooth) Brush
reviews.text:
these tooth brushes are so pretty. the heads are dwarfed by the handles, but the heads are the perfect size for my mouth and the handles are the perfect size for my hands, so no complaints. been using one for the last two days, with charcoal toothpaste and tooth powder. the black bristles make it a bit harder to see when the brush is totally cleaned after brushing, but not so much that it's a problem.

the bristles are great and leave my mouth feeling squeaky clean, but I wish the heads were replaceable because the carved handles are amazing. extremely comfortable, too. I'll definitely start a collection as the bristles die, then (after sawing off the heads) sand them down and use them for something decorative. they're far too pretty to toss in the garbage.

ever since discovering bamboo fabrics a couple of years ago I've been on a bamboo kick for any and everything possible. it's long been one of my favorite plants (and the first thing I planted here at my home), and that it's sustainable/environmentally friendly has made it my go-to. hadn't even considered that there might be toothbrushes made of bamboo, but the minute I saw them I grabbed them. HIGHly recommended. bamboo is the wave of the future!

title: Spinbrush PRO CLEAN Battery Powered Toothbrush, Soft Bristles, 1 Count, Gold or Blue Color May Vary
description: Kiss your plaque goodbye with your NEW and improved Spinbrush PRO CLEAN Powered Toothbrush! The dual-action power toothbrush head is clinically proven to remove up to 70% more plaque in hard-to-reach places than a manual toothbrush. Soft-bristled electric brushes are ADA Accepted and proven to help reduce plaque and help prevent gingivitis. Color-Wear bristles fade over time to help remind you when it's time to replace the brush head. Keep your handle to save money and plastic with Spinbrush toothbrush brand refill packs! Handles are available in premium gold or metallic blue accent colors and may vary with purchase. Toothbrush includes two (2) replaceable AA Duracell batteries. This Spinbrush battery-powered extra soft brush cleansing toothbrush is Dentist Recommended, Not Tested on Animals, and Made Without BPA Plastics. The new, easy-to-open carton is recyclable and the tray inside (plastic #1) is made with recycled materials. Spin your way to a spotless smile with this great cleaning toothbrush! Along with this adult toothbrush, kid options and additional dental hygiene items are available.
features: REMOVE MORE PLAQUE with Spinbrush PRO CLEAN brush heads; up to 70% more than a manual toothbrush in hard-to-reach places
DUAL ACTION BRUSH HEAD features oscillating circle (spinner) and sliding plate (scrubber), moving up to 3,900 sweeps per minute
SOFT SWITCH power buttons are easier to turn on/off and help prevent water from leaking inside the brush
ADA ACCEPTED toothbrush with soft bristles clinically proven to help remove plaque and help reduce gingivitis
Formerly known as ARM & HAMMER Spinbrush ProClean

reviews.title: It's great for getting kids to brush!
reviews.text: I guess there isn't much to say, it's the refill, not the brush itself. You have to replace the heads every so often and this is it. Kids (mine) brush better with the spinbrush.

reviews.title: Good price to keep your Spinbrush going! Two brush heads and they last!
reviews.text: I like my Spinbrush and the original head lasted for months. The replacement head was easy to snap on and works with many A&H Spinbrushes. I like my Brush and think these spin heads do a much better job  of cleaning, especially the back teeth.

reviews.title: Replacement Spinbrush Heads
reviews.text: I purchased these to replace my old heads. They're not cheap but they were less expensive than in the stores. I like how well they clean my teeth. I feel like it's getting all of my teeth thoroughly clean and polishing them as well.

title: Pop Sonic Electric Toothbrush with Travel Case (Teal) - Soft Electric Toothbrushes Keeps Mouth Fresh All-Day Toothbrush w/ 2 Speed - 18,000-24,000 Strokes/Minute Vibrations
features: Portable Electric Toothbrush With Case: Our battery operated toothbrush for adults and kids keeps your mouth fresh all day. This kit includes 1 x soft bristle electric toothbrush handle, 2 x Brush Heads with Nylon Bristles, 1 x Toothbrush Case, One AAA Battery, & Instruction Manual.

Gives Perfect Strokes: Our tooth brushes for teeth electric feature 2 speeds (to control your cleaning) with vibrations from 18,000 to 24,000 brush strokes per minute. These electric travel toothbrushes contain an easy-to-use on / off switch.

Styling Carrying Case: This portable toothbrush electric comes with its own carrying case making travel toothbrushes ideal for on-the-go oral care. The stylish electric toothbrush carrying case protects from unclean surfaces and avoids spillage from a wet toothbrush after use.

Great for Kids Too: With our whitening toothbrush, handy carrying case, and selection of bright colors, kids will love the Go Plus Sonic Toothbrush. Perfectly sized electric toothbrush for kids 8-12 or above that fits smaller hands for younger, more sensitive mouths.

Durable, Develop Healthy Brushing Habits: These oral hygiene products are programmed with a quadrant pacer and a 2-minute timer. Our travel electric toothbrushes for adults and kids are made with high-quality and long-lasting DuPont nylon bristles for longer life.

reviews.title: Nice toothbrush with a travel case
reviews.text: Nice toothbrush with a travel case. The vibrations are weaker than expected.  I like the timer.  We'll see if the dentist notices a difference.

reviews.title: Great toothbrush to take for travel
reviews.text: I hate when having to choose to use a regular stationary toothbrush, or my big rechargeable toothebrush when traveling. This toothbrush was perfect to take with me on my last trip as it is small, lightweight, sleek with the rose gold design, and comes with a really nice and compact case. Another huge plus is that it is really very quiet when it is on, so you don't risk having to wake others up. It is a great choice for a travel toothbrush.

reviews.title: It's just a vibrating toothbrush
reviews.text: This is really just a vibrating toothbrush.

reviews.title: I really love it
reviews.text: This toothbrush is perfect in every possible way.

title: Solodent Toothbrush Ultra Soft, Silver & Gold for Sensitive Teeth and Gums (Pack of 1) Colors May Vary
description: Enjoy the unprecedented, professional-like, cleaning experience of all-in-one Multi-Action Solodent SILVER SERIES Toothbrushes. Flossing Slim Ultra Soft Bristles gently clean hard to reach areas, between the teeth, under the gum line, and save tooth enamel from abrasion. They softly stimulate sensitive gums without bleeding or pain. Extra Soft Bristles make this toothbrush perfect for those with gum recession, sensitive teeth, exposed roots, implants and braces. Silver infused embossed PBT bristles naturally fight and minimize bacterial growth on bristles and keep them clean between uses. Innovative Patented 3D Embossed PBT Bristles are designed to gently and effectively remove maximum plaque due to multitouch contacts to tooth surfaces. Actual Gold infused bristles. PBT (polybutylene terephthalate) bristles are more durable and less water-absorbent than traditional nylon bristles and outlast them by 50%. Beautiful patent pending diamond pattern design and ergonomic handle. Designed by a dentist. Made in South Korea.

reviews.title: Edit: Good for my 2 year old
reviews.text:
I realize it says it's a kids toothbrush but it's huge! It's bigger than a regular sized brush for adults. I intended this for my 2 year old for Christmas. It's my fault for not looking at details. I've been searching for an Olaf one and this was on sale. I have not tried it but will update when we do...

Update: I gave this to my daughter early because she saw Olaf. It does fit in her mouth and the on/off buttons are easy for her to push. It's her favorite color, purple. She actually brushes her teeth. Well the toothbrush does the work! I don't see a timer on it. So far, the battery is doing fine. My biggest concern is replacing the head. It's already looking like I should replace.

title: PerioSciences White Care Oral Care Kit - Toothpaste, Mouthwash, Gel
features: For your oral health -​​ PerioSciences Whitening Oral Care System is a three-product system for daily use by individuals who undergo peroxide-based professional whitening or strips. The product trio can make teeth even brighter, soothe soft tissue, and restore pH balance in the mouth.

Natural ingredients - This dental care kit is made using our signature antioxidants and botanicals such as Phloretin, perilla seed extract, and hesperetin. The whitening toothpaste contains plasdone along with grapefruit seed extracts and micro-minerals to gently polish and thoroughly cleanse surface stains while removing unhealthy build-up.

Dentist recommended - PerioSciences has worked with dentists for over 10 years to perfect our formula containing scientifically proven ingredients that focus on the mouth's natural defense system. Our products are recommended and used by over 1000 dentists nationwide.

Easy to use - Brush teeth with AO ProToothpaste. Rinse with 1 tsp of AO ProRinse for up to 1 minute then spit out. Apply a pea-sized amount of AO ProVantage Gel to gums using a fingertip or cotton swab, let gel dissolve, then spit out. Do not eat or drink for 30 minutes after application.

Redefining Oral Care with Antioxidants - PerioSciences believes in harnessing the power of nature using antioxidants and science in a novel dual approach by using ingredients known to have properties that keep your oral health and your smile at its best.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: This product works well. Although pricey, so worth it to save your teeth.

reviews.title: It is recommended by my dentist!
reviews.text: Use it daily and keeps my oral implants clean and healthy!

reviews.title: cleans my teeth well
reviews.text: Love this set, it cleans and freshens my breath.  My teeth feel cleaner longer than with regular toothpaste.  My breath stays fresh all day.  the mouthwash does not burn and the paste is gel like and it does not taste good or bad.

reviews.title: Synergistic formulation
reviews.text:
Excellent at controlling bad breath.
Especially for those of us who have a dry mouth, be it through illness or medications, I can tell you that this product is excellent and that area.
I used it during a time when I also had some mouth irritation. I feel that it helped to heal without any sting.

reviews.title: great set of premium oral care products
reviews.text: It seems like a lot of oral care companies are now going more high end, as I am starting to see toothpaste for over $10 when you can get "normal" toothpaste at the drugstore for $1-$2 (with a coupon). I was drawn to this because it is fluoride free. The toothpaste is nice and minty fresh, my mouth felt clean and fresh afterwards. I know that the brownish colored toothpaste may bother some people but I have used herbal toothpaste before so no color is "weird" or off limits for me - as long as they taste fine. There's even a few brands out there that has black colored paste! I really like the mouthwash as well and I'm surprised it is alcohol free because I feel like it does as good of a job as an alcohol one that I just recently purchased - minus the burn. My mouth just smelled and felt amazing after using both. I wasn't as fond of the dental gel as I found it useless and not something I would want to use much of. Overall this is a very nice set of oral care products and I would highly recommend the toothpaste and the mouth wash. I personally would repurchase the toothpaste and mouthwash - I hope they have a set with just those two items.

title: Pyhralke Schallcare Replacement Brush Heads Fit for Braun Oral b, Precision Heads Compatible with Oral-B Pro1000/9600/5000/3000/1500/Genius and Smart Electric Toothbrush(4pcs)
features: Compatible with Oral-B , Deep Sweep, SmartSeries, ProSeries, Triumph, Advance Power, ProfessionalCare, ProfessionalCare SmartSeries, Vitality Floss Action, Vitality Dual Clean, Vitality CrossAction, Vitality Precision Clean, Vitality Pro White, Vitality Sensitive, Vitality TriZone.(Attention: DO NOT compatible with oral b io)

Schallcare brush heads, the bristles with bacterial protective function, which can prevent bacterial growth on the brush. Also with strong cleaning function, which can removes up to 3x more plaque along the gum line than a traditional manual toothbrush.

Safe, healthy, and durable. Made with soft and flexible DuPont bristles and approved to meet official dental health and safety standards. At the same time, the production of brush heads uses a unique process technique, which greatly enhances the durability of the toothbrush head.

The slightly longer bristles at both ends are designed to easily clean the oral blind area--every side of the innermost teeth, also clean the gap of teeth, for comprehensive cleaning, fresh breath, prevention of tooth decay.

The soft to middle bristles protect teeth from harmful hard brushes and offer a more comfortable cleaning, better for your teeth and gum health. Side-to-side bristles sweep away plaque while the moving power tip penetrates hard to reach areas and fixed filaments help to whiten the enamel, reaching the most difficult areas.

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.

Which is why they can’t get to all the areas of the mouth properly. They make good teething tool and starter toothbrushes for kids close to 12 months or so.

reviews.title: They are handy

title: Brush Buddies Blippi Kids Toothbrushes, Manual Toothbrushes for Kids, Toothbrush for Toddlers 2-4 Years, Blippi Childrens Toothbrush, Soft Toothbrushes, 3PK
description: It’s never too early to introduce a healthy oral care routine— start with Brush Buddies Blippi Toothbrushes! Each pack includes 6 soft bristle toothbrushes with a variety of colors and designs for a fun addition to your little one’s mornings and evenings. Each children’s toothbrush features a small, rounded brush head and textured ergonomic handle for easy grip. The bristles are gentle enough to effectively clean while protecting your child’s sensitive gums and enamel.
features: [What's Included] The Brush Buddies Blippi Manual Toothbrush Pack includes 3 multi-colored Blippi kid's toothbrushes.
[Ultra-Gentle] Each soft bristle toothbrush features a rounded brush head for effective, gentle cleaning while protecting your child's delicate gums and enamel.

[Great for Toddlers] Brush Buddies Blippi Toothbrushes are a great introduction to oral care for your toddlers and young children! The small head size and ergonomic handles are ideal for little ones as they learn to brush their teeth.
[Make Brushing Fun] With bright colors and unique Blippi learning activities, the children's toothbrushes are sure to make every morning a fun and exciting routine.
[Rotate Regularly] Although dentists recommend a new toothbrush every 90 days, it's important to swap your child's toothbrush after they get sick, too!

reviews.title: Won't Buy Again
reviews.text:
I bought 2 boxes of these as pencil cases for my classroom. I know that's not what they're intended for but I'm rating them on the fact that they are extremely thin plastic which makes them hard to line up and close. They are also short. I tried my toothbrush in one of them and it wouldn't close.
(If you're a teacher wanting to use them as pencil holders, there are multiple holes on both ends that allow your pencils to poke through)

title: Dr. Collins Perio Toothbrush With Supersoft Bristles, Pink/White
description: The Dr. Collins Perio Toothbrush is unlike any other toothbrush on the market. With its innovative, patented tapering technique, the Perio Toothbrush features super slim polyester bristles that penetrate further between the teeth to remove plaque and debris. The Perio Toothbrush bristles are also ultra soft, reducing the likelihood of abrasion and recession while simultaneously allowing gentle gum stimulation. The polyester bristles of the Perio Toothbrush are less porous, creating a more hygienic brushing experience. The bristle also lasts approximately 50% longer than a standard nylon toothbrush. The Perio Toothbrush is great for all ages, including those undergoing orthodontic treatment, suffering from sensitivity or gum recession.

reviews.title: Very soft, feels effective too
reviews.text: This is the softest toothbrush i have ever used.  I grew up believing that the harder the brush, the better for your teeth.  Now that i have almost no enamel left on my teeth i'm beginning to believe that softer might have been better all along.  These are super soft and almost fun to brush with.  I also bought the new Crest "chocolate" toothpaste!  If you're looking for a gentle and soft toothbrush, this is the one!

reviews.title: Excellent ultra soft  toothbrush
reviews.text: Dr Collins makes the best ultra soft toothbrush for excellent dental hygiene.... makes a big difference.... great purchase!!

reviews.title: Have used these for years and I really like them.
reviews.text: These perio toothbrushes are very comfortable and effective. I have used them for years. I like them better than the type brushes my dentist gives me with my 6 month cleaning visits.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text: Really like this toothbrush.

reviews.title: Excellent!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is the best brush out there imo. First of all, this brush only comes in a compact size, which is the size most people should be using (versus full). Second, the bristles are very soft and gentle and are all the same length... there is no scratchy feel like with some other brushes that have various length bristles to reach further under the gumline. These bristles are very gentle on gums yet clean them well. The best thing is that the brush really cleans the teeth. In my experience this toothbrush cleans better that the oral b line, better than mentadent pro care, better than reach, and better than the butler gum summit which has similar tapered bristles. This is a very good toothbrush that gets the job done gently but very effectively.

title: N-amboo Super Hard Toothbrush Bamboo Toothbrush Large Brush Head Manual Toothbrsuh Hard Bristles Pack of 4

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

features: High Frequency For Deeper Cleaning---From 31,000 to 43,000 sonic vibrations per minute, effectively remove plaque and reduce gums bleeding. Deep cleaning between teeth. The cleaning effect is far more remarkable than manual toothbrush

5 Cleaning Modes and Smart Memory Function---5 high performance brushing modes for different tooth and gum conditions: Clean, White, Fresh, Soft and Strong. Equipped with intelligent memory function. When you use it again, it will automatically select the mode you used last time

Efficient Type C Charging and 60 days Battery Life---Charged once, works for 60 days. The powerful and durable battery life means you don't have to charge it frequently. Advanced USB C charging port is compatible with most USB power adapter, make your travel more convenient

2 Minutes Timer for Scientific Brushing Habit---Follow scientific dental advice with built in 2 minutes smart timer. The toothbrush pauses every 30 seconds to remind you to move, precisely control your brushing time

IPX7 Waterproof with 5 Replacing Brush---IPX7 waterproof level, no fear of washing with water. Handy to use and easy to clean. 5 spare brush heads are included in the package, no need to pay extra for replacement brush heads

title: RADIUS - Source Toothbrush, Replacement-Head Technology and a Handle Made from Repurposed Materials, Colors May Vary (Super Soft, 1 Count)
description: Thanks to replacement-head technology and a handle made from repurposed materials, the Source™ reduces waste by 93%. When you’re done with one of its patented, gum-stimulating heads you simply swap it for another. And the luxurious cleaning continues.
features: EARTH-FRIENDLY and EASY TO HANDLE: Thanks to replacement-head technology and a handle made from repurposed materials, the Source reduces waste by 93%. When you’re done with one of its patented, gum-stimulating heads you simply swap it for another.

REPLACEABLE HEADS WITH PREMIUM BRISTLES: The Source cuts back on plastic usage while simultaneously boasting a unique curved bristle-bed, ensuring our sumptuously soft bristles clean and massage the gum rather than aggravating them.
LONGER NECK FOR A BETTER REACH: The Source has an unbreakable slim neck that’s longer than your average toothbrush to provide maximum reach in tight spaces.

UPCYCLED NATURAL-FEEL HANDLE: The elegant, one-of-a-kind handle is composed of repurposed and recycled materials — like wood, paper and even recycled dollar bills — for a beautiful, natural look and feel.
REVERSIBLE HANDLE DESIGN: As user-friendly for lefties as it is for right-handed brushers, the ergonomic design helps reduce pressure on teeth and gums for optimal oral health.

title: Preserve Eco Friendly Adult Toothbrushes, Made in The USA from Recycled Plastic, Soft Bristles, Colors Vary, 6 Count
description: Preserve toothbrush in travel case 6-pk, soft bristle Preserve consulted closely with dental professionals to create a toothbrush that gets your teeth cleaner but minimizes your impact on the environment. The design includes a curved handle for those hard-to-reach places and a three-level bristle arrangement to massage your gums. And while the bristles are brand new, the handle is made from recycled yogurt cups. The reusable, clear travel case features ventilation holes and a cap to keep your toothbrush clean and dry wherever you take it or store it. Available in assorted colors including grass green, midnight blue, sky blue, magenta and white. - Product measures: 0.875x.5x8.875 - manufactured in: Made in the USA.
features: 100% recycled plastics in handle, at least 25% recycled stony field farm« yogurt cups
Tri-level virgin nylon bristles with softer outer rows to protect your gums and tooth enamel
Curved handle, developed with dental professionals, for an effective and thorough cleaning
Preserve toothbrush and packaging are completely recyclable through Preserve, please visit Preserve's corporate website for details
Packaging is reusable travel case with ventilation holes

reviews.title: The best

This is the very best toothbrush that I have ever used. My dentist had never heard of this toothbrush, so I contacted the company, and they sent him samples. I will be anxious to know what he thinks.

This toothbrust has soft bristles on the side which makes it unlikely to cause gum damage.

reviews.title: Make a softer brush
reviews.text: It cleans well, the bristles are not soft. I use it for my son with sensory issues. If they could make a brush with soft bristles, I would buy in bulk!

reviews.title: Fraction of the work of normal toothbrushes!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are great. I have been using the Mentadent (similar type of brush for adults) brushes on my teeth for years and can't find them anymore. I came across these brushes for my autistic child from a therapist. It allows me to brush their teeth in half the time and more precisely than when I try a regular toothbrush. It also helps them learn to brush their teeth with less frustration while hitting more areas of the teeth. Its a great concept and I am really surprised the regular toothbrush manufacturers aren't making these and putting them in stores everywhere.  The downside is the price- I do wish they were cheaper.
